Script_outline: Intro -> last-year filing recall -> companion concept reaction -> mismatch scenario -> pricing reaction -> wrap
Key_questions: Q1: Walk me through how you filed last year. Q2: What was the most confusing moment? Q3: Did you know AIS/26AS existed before filing?

Script_outline: Same spine, probe form-selection anxiety and notice fear
Key_questions: Q4: How confident were you picking ITR-1/2/3/4? Q5: Have you ever received a 143(1) intimation - how did it feel?

Script_outline: Same spine, probe presumptive + advance tax confusion
Key_questions: Q6: How do you decide what income to report? Q7: Did you understand presumptive taxation?

Script_outline: Probe where clients get stuck; what a companion should never claim
Key_questions: Q8: Where do DIY clients most often go wrong? Q9: What would make you trust/distrust a companion tool?

Q10: After seeing this, who actually files your return - you or the tool? (tests companion comprehension). Q11: At what point would you expect to pay? (paywall timing). Q12: Was the portal step-by-step guide useful or redundant?
Output_location: Use as moderated test once a prototype exists
